zh.lifeSummary: Sarah Galliard是Roger Galliard和Joane Edrych的女兒，於大約1592年出生。她和Benjamin Fairfax至少有4個兒子和7個女兒。她去世於1671年享年80歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Sarah Galliard是Roger Galliard和Joane Edrych的女儿，于大约1592年出生。她和Benjamin Fairfax至少有4个儿子和7个女儿。她去世于1671年享年80岁。

nameMeanings.name: Galliard
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Gaylard
meanings: Norman, English, Huguenot: (i) relationship name from the Old French personal name Gaillart (Continental Germanic * Gailhard ‘lofty’ + ‘hard’). (ii) nickname from Middle English gaillard, galiard ‘lively, brisk; gay, spirited’, Old French gaillard, gaillart.

nameMeanings.name: Sarah
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Biblical name, borne by the wife of Abraham and mother of Isaac. According to the Book of Genesis, she was originally called Sarai (possibly meaning ‘contentious’ in Hebrew), but had her name changed by God to the more auspicious Sarah ‘princess’ in token of a greater blessing (Genesis 17:15, ‘And God said unto Abraham, As for Sarai thy wife, thou shalt not call her name Sarai, but Sarah shall her name be’). This has been one of the most enduringly popular girls' names.

variants.name: Sara
meanings: Variant of   Sarah .  This is the form used in the Greek of the New Testament (Hebrews 11:11).

en.lifeSummary: Sarah Galliard was born about 1592 as the daughter of Roger Galliard and Joane Edrych. She had at least 4 sons and 7 daughters with Benjamin Fairfax. She died in 1671, at the age of 80.

fr.lifeSummary: Sarah Galliard est née environ 1592, fille de Roger Galliard et Joane Edrych. Elle a eu au moins 4 fils et 7 filles avec Benjamin Fairfax. Elle est décédée en 1671, à l’âge de 80 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Sarah Galliard wurde um 1592, als Tochter von Roger Galliard und Joane Edrych geboren. Sie hatte mit Benjamin Fairfax mindestens 4 Söhne und 7 Töchter. Sie starb 1671 im Alter von 80 Jahren.

it.lifeSummary: Sarah Galliard è nata il circa 1592 come figlia di Roger Galliard e Joane Edrych. Lei avuto almeno 4 figli e 7 figlie con Benjamin Fairfax. Morì nel 1671, all'età di 80 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Sarah Galliardは約1592年にRoger GalliardとJoane Edrychの娘として生まれた。彼女はBenjamin Fairfaxとの間に少なくとも4人の息子と7人の娘をもうけた。彼女は1671年に80歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Sarah Galliard(은)는 대략 1592년 Roger Galliard(와)과 Joane Edrych의 딸로 태어났다. 그녀는 Benjamin Fairfax(와)과 적어도 네 명의 아들과 일곱 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1671년 80세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Sarah Galliard nasceu aproximadamente 1592 filha de Roger Galliard e Joane Edrych. Ela teve pelo menos 4 filhos e 7 filhas com Benjamin Fairfax. Ela faleceu em 1671, com 80 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Sarah Galliard родилась около 1592 г. Её родителей звали Roger Galliard и Joane Edrych. У неё было по крайней мере 4 сына и 7 дочерей от Benjamin Fairfax. Она умерла в 1671 г. в возрасте 80 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Sarah Galliard nació aproximadamente 1592 como hija de Roger Galliard y Joane Edrych. Tuvo por lo menos 4 hijos y 7 hijas con Benjamin Fairfax. Murió en 1671, a la edad de 80 años.
